title: Heliocauta atlantica
intro: I couldn't find any reliable information on the plant "Heliocauta atlantica".
taxonomy: Heliocauta atlantica is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. It is native to South America and belongs to the genus Heliocauta. As a member of the Convolvulaceae family, it is closely related to other plants like morning glories and sweet potatoes. The classification of Heliocauta atlantica is further divided into its kingdom (Plantae), phylum (Magnoliophyta), and class (Magnoliopsida). More specifically, its full classification is Heliocauta atlantica, Convolvulaceae family, Magnoliopsida class, Magnoliophyta phylum, and Plantae kingdom.
